# UC-14.10.8 · Aranet RSSI Trending for Mesh Radio Health

## Description

Falling RSSI precedes packet loss in mesh deployments; early move or repeater planning avoids offline spikes.

## Value

Improves coverage in concrete-heavy facilities.

## Implementation

(1) Baseline per sensor. (2) Alert on 10 dB drop week over week. (3) Map AP/gateway placement.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-7d
| eval rssi=tonumber(coalesce(rssi_dbm, rssi, ""))
| where isnotnull(rssi)
| timechart span=1h median(rssi) by sensor_id
```

## Visualization

Line chart median RSSI; alert overlay.

## References

- [Aranet — environmental monitoring](https://aranet.com/)
- [ASHRAE — IAQ](https://www.ashrae.org/)
- [OSHA indoor air](https://www.osha.gov/indoor-air-quality)
